creator: rover@lglobus.ru
text:
On Mon, Dec 06, 1999 at 08:59:47PM -0600, Chris Costello wrote:
> On Fri, Dec 03, 1999, Oleg V. Volkov wrote:
> > --- sh.1.old	Thu Sep  2 16:09:48 1999
> > +++ sh.1	Fri Dec  3 05:04:05 1999
> > @@ -48,7 +48,8 @@
> >  .Op Fl c Ar string
> >  .Op Ar arg ...
> >  .Sh DESCRIPTION
> > -.Nm Sh
> > +A
> > +.Nm sh
>    ``A sh is ...'' makes even less sense than ``Sh is ...'',
> don't you think?

Well, then...
``A "sh" command interpreter (shell) ..." should do, I guess...
